notes: Namechange event cut from real Tushare corpus. Subject: 300209.SZ changed name from 有棵树 to 行云科技 on 2026-02-13 (ann_date 2026-02-13, start_date 2026-02-13, reason=改名). Old-name window 2025-05-13 to 2026-02-12. The case proves that mentions of the old name, the new name, and the bare ts_code all resolve to the same canonical_entity_id ENT_STOCK_300209.SZ without splitting into two entities — the core invariant entity-registry's namechange handling must preserve. canonical_entity_id format follows the live entity-registry runtime rule generate_stock_entity_id(ts_code)=f'ENT_STOCK_{ts_code}' (dot preserved); this deliberately diverges from the older ENT_STOCK_300750_SZ underscore convention used in case_001_one_stock_one_cycle and case_fuzzy_alias_simple, which predate the live runtime and represent a doc/code drift to be reconciled separately.

tushare_source.dataset_path: /Volumes/dockcase2tb/database_all/股票数据/基础数据/股票曾用名
